SEARCH
Package client.app

Class Navigator

java.lang.Object
client.app.Navigator
public class Navigator extends Object
Owns the content area inside the main shell and provides safe, animated navigation between role-authorized screens.

Only screens registered by MainShellController can be opened. Since that controller registers screens according to the active Session, the navigator is also the second client-side guard against opening screens that do not belong to the current user type. A call to go(String) for an unregistered id is ignored gracefully rather than crashing the UI.

    Describes one navigable screen.

  • Constructor Details

    • Navigator

      public Navigator(javafx.scene.layout.StackPane contentArea, NetworkService network, Session session, Consumer<Navigator.Screen> onScreenChange)
      Creates a navigator for a single shell instance.
      Parameters:
      contentArea - the stack pane into which FXML screens are loaded
      network - shared network facade
      session - active login session
      onScreenChange - callback used to update shell title/subtitle

  • Method Details

    • register

      public void register(Navigator.Screen s)
      Registers a screen that is allowed for the current user type.

    • canGo

      public boolean canGo(String id)
      Returns:
      true only if this screen was registered for the user.

    • bindNavButton

      public void bindNavButton(String screenId, javafx.scene.control.Button btn)
      Binds a sidebar button to a registered screen id.

    • currentScreen

      public Navigator.Screen currentScreen()
      Returns:
      the current screen, or null before the first navigation

    • go

      public void go(String id)
      Loads and displays a registered screen using a short professional entrance animation. Calls BaseController.onHide() on the outgoing screen and BaseController.onShow() on the incoming one.
      Parameters:
      id - registered screen id

    • instantiate

      private Object instantiate(Class<?> type)
      Builds the controller requested by FXMLLoader.

    • prepareForEntrance

      private void prepareForEntrance(javafx.scene.Node node)
      Applies the initial visual state before the screen entrance animation.

    • playEntrance

      private void playEntrance(javafx.scene.Node node)
      Plays a fade + slight vertical movement for a polished screen transition.

    • buildNavButton

      public static javafx.scene.control.Button buildNavButton(String icon, String label)
      Builds a styled sidebar navigation button with icon and label.

    • contentNode

      public javafx.scene.Node contentNode()
      Returns:
      the shell content stack pane.
